field.name: Enable
field.description: Master enable for the device interrupt output to the system interrupt controller: 0 = Disabled, 1 = Enabled

field.name: CHAN0_INT_ST
field.description: Channel 0 (ap_done) Interrupt Status. 0 = No Channel 0 input interrupt, 1 = Channel 0 input interrup

field.name: CHAN1_INT_ST
field.description: Channel 1 (ap_ready) Interrupt Status. 0 = No Channel 1 input interrupt, 1 = Channel 1 input interrup

table.keys: Interface, Data Width, Address Width, Offset, Register
Interface, Register Mode, TDATA, TDEST, TID, TKEEP, TLAST, TREADY, TSTRB, TUSER, TVALID
Argument, HW Name, HW Type, HW Info
